steps.title: Use the visible-influence clue
steps.content: The passage says architectural tourists can easily recognize Spanish mission influence in Pasadena City Hall. The blank should describe an influence that is clearly noticeable across the state.

steps.title: Choose the perceptible word
steps.content: B means subtle or downplayed, which conflicts with "easily recognize." C means confirmed by evidence, not visibly felt. D means disputed, though the passage presents no disagreement. The needed word means strongly perceptible. The answer is A.
